disclaimer: 가격 수익률 분해는 추정이며 투자, 세무, 법률 또는 매매 조언이 아닙니다.

sourcePolicy.holdingsHistory: Full provider holdings are persisted; TOP10 is a derived dashboard view.
sourcePolicy.prices: Ordered best-effort chain: local fixtures, Yahoo Chart query1/query2 adjusted closes, Stooq CSV, optional FinanceDataReader, then ETF provider valuation-per-share KRW fallback for still-held names.
sourcePolicy.googleFinance: Google Finance has no stable public historical HTTP API in this updater; use it only as manual cross-check outside scheduled automation.
sourcePolicy.attribution: No-trade predicted weight = previous full-holding weight × (1 + security return) / (1 + full-holdings benchmark return).
sourcePolicy.confidenceRule: returnCoverage below 60% is marked mixed/low confidence; provider valuation fallback lowers price-source confidence.
